MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-17-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHERINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS ON PLAINTIFF AMBER ALLRED'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST AND 2ND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BUT SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE OTHERS TO SUPPORT FACTS TO SUPPORT AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Craig Miller, Esq. og Weisberg & Miller, 415-296-7070 for plaintiff and moving party Amber Ann Allred
Leonor Noguez-Ward, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3854 for defendant and opposing party City and County of San Francisco

RULING:
JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHERINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE.

ARGUED and the Court ruled as follows on PLAINTIFF AMBER ALLRED'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED AS TO THE 1ST AND 2ND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BUT SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE OTHERS TO SUPPORT FACTS TO SUPPORT AN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. Plaintiff to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
